feed.title: Çağatay Özcan Jagiello Gutt - meta
feed.subtitle: Cognitive Science Student (M.Sc.) & Molecular Biologist (B.Sc.) | Artificial Consciousness, BCI & HMI Research | Physiological Computing & AI

entry.title: Website Update
entry.content:
This website has been updated with the following changes:

Recent Changes

  • 1492a88 Ignore dotfiles/dotdirs, per-repo pipeline data, cache v2
  • 5b965af Recursive tree rendering: mirror exact repo folder structure
  • 2fb75ff Flat folder discovery: show all files from results dirs, README at bottom
  • 08ebe76 Auto-show README on folder expand, add log viewer with filtering, broaden file d
  • a88c520 Show project README in main content area instead of sidebar dropdown

The site continues to sync automatically with GitHub (projects) and ORCID (publications).

View source on GitHub →
